mapper.sql:
FROM room_info ri JOIN room r ON ri.pid = r.id JOIN goods g ON r.goods = g.id LEFT JOIN warehouse w ON r.warehouse = w.id WHERE 1=1
AND ri.time < DATE_ADD(#{q.queryDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
AND g.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{q.productName}, '%')
AND r.warehouse IN
#{wid}
mapper.select:
SELECT g.id AS goodsId, g.name AS productName, g.number AS productCode, g.spec AS specification, -- 若字段不是 spec，请改成实际列 g.unit AS unit, SUM(CASE WHEN ri.direction = 1 THEN ri.nums ELSE -ri.nums END) AS totalQuantity, SUM(ri.price * (CASE WHEN ri.direction = 1 THEN ri.nums ELSE -ri.nums END)) AS totalAmount, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN ri.direction = 1 THEN ri.nums ELSE -ri.nums END) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(ri.price * (CASE WHEN ri.direction = 1 THEN ri.nums ELSE -ri.nums END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN ri.direction = 1 THEN ri.nums ELSE -ri.nums END) END AS avgCost
GROUP BY g.id ORDER BY g.name

SELECT g.id AS goodsId, g.name AS productName, g.number AS productCode, g.spec AS specification, g.unit AS unit, SUM(CASE WHEN ri.direction = 1 THEN ri.nums ELSE -ri.nums END) AS totalQuantity, SUM(ri.price * (CASE WHEN ri.direction = 1 THEN ri.nums ELSE -ri.nums END)) AS totalAmount, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN ri.direction = 1 THEN ri.nums ELSE -ri.nums END) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(ri.price * (CASE WHEN ri.direction = 1 THEN ri.nums ELSE -ri.nums END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN ri.direction = 1 THEN ri.nums ELSE -ri.nums END) END AS avgCost
GROUP BY g.id ORDER BY g.name

SELECT r.goods AS goodsId, r.warehouse AS warehouseId, w.name AS warehouseName, SUM(CASE WHEN ri.direction = 1 THEN ri.nums ELSE -ri.nums END) AS quantity, SUM(ri.price * (CASE WHEN ri.direction = 1 THEN ri.nums ELSE -ri.nums END)) AS amount, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN ri.direction = 1 THEN ri.nums ELSE -ri.nums END) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(ri.price * (CASE WHEN ri.direction = 1 THEN ri.nums ELSE -ri.nums END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN ri.direction = 1 THEN ri.nums ELSE -ri.nums END) END AS cost
AND r.goods IN
#{gid}
GROUP BY r.goods, r.warehouse ORDER BY w.name
